name: The FTL Nav-Computer
description: Extract hyperspace coordinates by triggering a core cache dump abort sequence.

flaws.name: Feed Zero Value
flaws.flavor_text: Feed a zero-value into the dark-matter manifold, triggering an internal calculation of infinity.

flaws.name: Trigger Abort Sequence
flaws.flavor_text: Infinity calculations trigger a jump-abort sequence, causing the system to dump the core cache to prevent corruption.
